name: @videoforge/script-studio
description: Script Studio P0 — pure, headless assembler that turns a script string into a valid §18 Project (+ a sidecar ScriptManifest). No TTS, no FFmpeg, no I/O. Depends only on @videoforge/project-schema; reuses @videoforge/templates authoring builders. Text cards are constrained to the export-rendered drawtext subset so preview == export holds by construction.
